{{Quote|On Froz we have a saying. 'Things are bad when there are more questions than answers, but worse, but worse, when there are more answers than questions.'|Micamberlecto|<ref name="AC">''[[Ambush at Corellia]]''</ref>}}
'''Froz''' was the homeworld of the [[Frozian/Legends|Frozian]] species. It was on the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]]. It was a pristine low-gravity [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Froz was [[Devastation of Froz|devastated]] in an [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital bombardment]] by the order of [[Naomi Dargon]], the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector's]] [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]], for supporting the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

[[File:Exploring-Froz_Star-Wars-Suns-of-Fortune.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A couple of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] exploring the devastated surface of Froz]]
When the planet was liberated by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], restoration projects were initiated with much of the natural life on the planet restored. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the New Republic and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] used the asteroids in the [[Froz system/Legends|Froz system]] as [[Listening post/Legends|communications bases]], monitoring the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] presence in the Corellian sector. However, the planet fell to the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] invaders and its inhabitants were [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]]. Though the Yuuzhan Vong left Froz alone, they took many Frozians and experimented on them, trying to "[[Shaping protocol|shape]]" them into a slave species like they [[Vagh Rodiek|had done]] to the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]]. Frozians from across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] returned home and fought back against the alien invaders.

{{Planet-stub}}
